full_text:
The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase, followed by Collagenase & Hyaluronidase (C&H).

Dispase dissociation media included 19.4 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 400 µl Dispase + 200 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer.

Further dissociated the leftover tissue pieces with 17.8 ml DMEM/F12+++, 2 ml Collagenase & Hyaluronidase, and 200 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C, rotating for 1 hour, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Dispase dissociated cells:

RBC lysis with 3 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++.

The final pellet was resuspended in 1 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Sequentially dissociated cells: RBC lysis with 2 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++.

The final pellet was resuspended in 1 of DMEM/F12+++.

For counting, a 1:10 dilution of both cell suspensions was made.

Cell counts:

Dead cell removal

Dead cell removal was done with both the dispase and the dispase + C&H fractions separately. For each one, a column was used.

For the dispase fraction:

33E6 cells were mixed with 336.5 uL of beads, and 163.5 uL of previously diluted 1x binding buffer.

For the dispase + C&H fraction:

33.95 E6 cells were mixed with 339.5 uL of beads, and 160.5 uL of previously diluted 1x binding buffer.

Purification was done according to the manufacturer's protocol.

Cell counts:

Biobanking

After dead cell removal, live cells were biobanked.

Live dispase dissociated cells: 1x 2.99 E6 cells

Live sequentially dissociated cells: 2x 3.09 E6 cells

Cells were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker.
